core/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 bytecode, preventing the use of Java 21 language features and potentially causing compatibility issues with tools expecting Java 21 artifacts.

core/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok (like 1.16.10) do not support Java 21 bytecode generation or annotation processing, leading to compilation errors or runtime failures.

core/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: Guava 18.0 does not support Java 21; using it may result in runtime errors due to removed or changed internal APIs in newer JDKs.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 14+ serialization field validation rules.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' field must be annotated with @Serial in Java 14+ when strict serialization checks are enabled or required by the migration recipe.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial to support the new annotation on serialVersionUID.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Annotate the serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.why_exists: Compilation error: 'serialVersionUID' is not a valid serial field without the @Serial annotation in Java 17+.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.

core/src/main/java/org/stream/core/excep.general_idea: Annotate the serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices.
Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation.
